steps.title: Part 1 of 2
steps.instruction: Part 1 of 2: Master Mix Assembly Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) * [Part 3: Thermocycler](./thermocycler) This protocol allows your robot to create a master mix solution using any reagents stored in a 2 mL Eppendorf tube rack or a 2 mL screwcap tube rack. The master mix will be created in well A1 of the trough. The ingredient information will be provided as a CSV file. See Additional Notes for more details. --- You will need: * [4-in-1 Tube Rack Set](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/tube-rack-set-1) * [12-well Trough](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx)

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.

steps.title: Robot will transfer each reagent from...
steps.instruction: Robot will transfer each reagent from its source to well A1 of trough in slot 3.
